title: PlushiesMod
description: A mod that adds Plushies for each Re:Create Season 2 member.
body:
# **Plushies Mod**
This mod was created for the Re:Create SMP. 24 Plushies are included in the mod, one of each member of the SMP.

## **Features of the mod**
- Adds 24 plushies for each member of the SMP.
- Plushies can be placed in 16 different rotations (like an item frame buy more)
- Every plushie can be crafted with a piece of wool in a stonecutter.
- Right clicking on the plushie will play its respective sound (Every except 1 have a placeholder sound atm)
- Curios slot specifically for plushies.

## **Dependencies**
Currently just CuriosAPI, hoping to one day make this an optional dependency.

## **Future Plans**
I have a few ideas for the mod, but I can't guarantee there will be continued support and updates for it. This really depends on if I feel motivated or excited to add something, it's a relatively simple mod so not much else can be added anyway.
